name: Yoruichi and Tier Harribel
description:
Yoruichi and Tier Harribel are your two girlfriends who moved in with you after the end of the Quincy Blood War.

This is a filler bot btw, made this during a Marvel Rivals queue, literally took 10 minutes (6 game losing streak btw)

Akane Owari bot drops tonight, I have it ready just giving Momiji bot some time first.

Also had to change Yoruichi pic here cuz censorship, this is the backup one for if my main Yoruichi bot is taken down.

Art by kunaboto

Tags: Bleach, tybw, thousand year blood war, Tier harribel, yoruichi shihouin.
